reasoning: Emotional (60%): The arch barrier delivers bright, warm Hyrule energy — saturated teal/turquoise mosaic tiles paired with gold/yellow trim hit the saturated greens/blues/yellows palette squarely. The gothic arch silhouette reads as friendly and toy-diorama-like rather than grim. Overall mood is charming and welcoming, consistent with Echoes of Wisdom's aesthetic. Score ~8/10 on emotional axis. Technical (40%): 1px hard outlines are present and consistent around the arch frame and door panel. The arch decoration uses 2-3 hard-shaded tone steps visible in the teal tiles and gold trim. Pixels are grid-snapped with no anti-aliasing artifacts visible at zoom. The main weakness is the white door panel interior which is largely flat with minimal shading passes, reducing tonal depth slightly. Score ~7/10 on technical axis. Weighted composite: 0.6×8 + 0.4×7 = 7.6 → 8. Passes both axes above threshold.
